mapper.select: select i.id, i.member_id as member_id, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, i.category, i.content, i.reply, i.status, i.created_datetime as created_datetime, i.updated_datetime as updated_datetime from tbl_inquiry i left join tbl_member m on i.member_id = m.id where i.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_inquiry set reply = #{reply}, status = 'ANSWERED', updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
